LightningComponentBundle.description: Shared modern header for navigating between support pages.

property.name: brandName
property.label: Brand Name
property.description: Main heading shown on the header.

property.name: homePath
property.label: Home Path
property.description: Home page URL path from Experience Builder page settings.

property.name: homePageApiName
property.label: Home Page API Name
property.description: Home page API Name from Experience Builder (for robust named-page navigation).

property.name: caseFormPath
property.label: Case Form Path
property.description: Case form page path or slug.

property.name: caseTrackingPath
property.label: Case Tracking Path
property.description: Case tracking page path or slug.
